title: Luke (disambiguation)
content:
'''Luke''' may refer to any of several people in-universe or behind-the-scenes of ''Star Wars''. You may be looking for one of them or various entities related to them, listed below.

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Luke Skywalker]]''', a [[Jedi Master]] and hero of the [[Galactic Civil War]]
**'''[[Luke's hut]]'''
**'''[[Luke's hut (Ossus)|Luke's hut]]''' on [[Ossus]]
**'''[[Jedi star compass|Luke Skywalker's compass]]'''
**'''[[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber]]'''
**'''[[Luke Skywalker's toy T-16 skyhopper]]'''
**'''[[Luke Skywalker's yellow lightsaber]]'''

===[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]===
====Individuals====
*'''[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]''', the [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] of the [[New Jedi Order]]
*'''[[Luuke Skywalker]]''', a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of Luke Skywalker
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's best friend]]'''
*'''[[Luka d'al' Gargan]]''', daughter of [[Yarna d'al' Gargan/Legends|Yarna d'al' Gargan]], named after Luke Skywalker
*'''[[Luke Morgavi]]''', an alias once used by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]

====Vehicles====
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's T-16 skyhopper/Legends|Luke Skywalker's T-16 skyhopper]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's snowspeeder]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's freighter]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's scout craft]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's shuttle]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's starship (Harix)|Luke Skywalker's starship]]''', used on [[Harix]]
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's starship (Tatooine)|Luke Skywalker's starship]]''', used on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]

====Other====
*'''[[Luke's Backpack]]'''
*'''''[[Luke Skywalker and the Dragons of Tatooine]]'''''
*'''''[[Luke Skywalker and the Jedi's Revenge]]'''''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's chambers (Iridonia)|Luke Skywalker's chambers]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's dog]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's journal]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's lightsaber]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's private hideaway]]'''
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's shoto]]'''

===Non-canon===
*'''[[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]]''', a [[Jedi-Bendu]] and [[General/Legends|General]] living during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|New Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Luuuke Skywalker]]''', a second clone of Luke Skywalker
*'''[[Luke Skywalker's fangirls]]'''

===People===
*'''[[Melinda Luke]]''', a children's book author
*'''[[Luke Fisher]]'''
*'''[[Luke McDonnell]]''', a comic book artist
*'''[[Luke Ross]]''', a comic book artist
